chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse

text: 2821 - وَ سَأَلَ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلْمَرِيضِ اَلْمَغْلُوبِ يُطَافُ عَنْهُ بِالْكَعْبَةِ فَقَالَ «لاَ وَ لَكِنْ يُطَافُ بِهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2821 - Ishaq ibn Ammar asked Imam Abu Ibrahim (as) about a severely ill person who is unable to perform circumambulation around the Kaaba.
The Imam (as) replied: "No, but he should be carried and circumambulated with."
